subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Ḥusayn! Upon thee be the glory of God, the True and Manifest Sovereign. Hearken unto the Call from the Divine Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد الحسین علیک بهاء الله الملک الحق المبین اسمع الندآء من سدره المنتهی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Word of God and human limitations, @the power of words; of speech, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transcendence; unknowability of God
